creator: joeb1@a1poweruser.com
text:
After starting vnet jail using jail.conf as shown in /usr/share/examples/jails to use jng and logging in to the jail and issue
ping -c 2 1.1.1.1  receive following message 
ping: sendto: Network is unreachable


After starting vnet jail using jail.conf as shown in /usr/share/examples/jails to use jib and logging in to the jail and issue
ping -c 2 1.1.1.1  

got 100% packet loss.

Running on real hardware fbsd 12.1

The /usr/share/examples/jails contains examples of using rc.conf to define jails which is obsolete since fbsd release 10.0 and should be removed.
